raw_title: Going Local? Localized Rhetoric in Congressional Communications
title_en: Going Local? Localized Rhetoric in Congressional Communications
title_zh: 走向地方化？国会沟通中的地方化修辞
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨美国国会议员在沟通中如何使用地方化的语言和修辞策略，以更好地与选民建立联系。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how U.S. Congress members use localized language and rhetorical strategies in their communications to better connect with constituents.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中的修辞策略与地方化沟通研究
research_direction_en: Research on rhetorical strategies and localized communication in political communication
